# Volt

Volt is a personal resource, knowledge, and discovery management platform (a personal knowledge operating system). Users can save anything valuable from the internet, organize it into custom categories and collections, connect it to projects and people, and instantly retrieve it through a command-driven interface (Ctrl + K).

## Stack
- Next.js App Router (RSC)
- Tailwind CSS
- MongoDB (Relational-Array structures)
- Better Auth (Session-scoped multi-tenancy)
- GSAP & Lenis (Premium scroll and timeline animations)

## Public URL
https://ui-volt.vercel.app/

## Features
- Command Center navigation (Ctrl + K)
- User-owned custom Categories, Collections, Projects, Notes, People, and Media Watchlists
- Contextual Resource tracking (answering What, Why, and Where)
- Bidirectional entity relationship linking
- Chronological Activity Timeline
- Private, authenticated user workspaces
- Real-time TMDB and AniList media search and status tracking

## API
All `/api/*` endpoints are authentication-protected and intended only for valid user sessions.

## Access Policy
- Dashboard and workspace routes require authentication
- Do not crawl authenticated pages
- Do not perform automated request loops against `/api/*`
- User workspace data is private and session-scoped

## Robots & Sitemap
- `/robots.txt`
- `/sitemap.xml`

## Crawl Preference

Preferred:
- Public landing pages
- Public metadata and documentation
- `/privacy` (Privacy Policy)
- `/terms` (Terms of Service)

Avoid (private dashboard routes):
- `/login`
- `/pending-approval`
- `/account`
- `/explore`
- `/resources`
- `/categories`
- `/categories/*`
- `/projects`
- `/projects/*`
- `/notes`
- `/people`
- `/people/*`
- `/media-watchlist`
- `/tags`
- `/commands`
- `/users`
- `/api/*`
